luma.screen.dashboard.title: Workspaces
luma.screen.project.title: Workspace: %s
luma.screen.recovery.title: Recovery
luma.screen.compare.title: Compare: %s
luma.screen.create_project.title: Create Project
luma.screen.settings.title: Settings: %s
luma.dashboard.empty: Lumi could not find a workspace for this world yet.
luma.dashboard.workspace_hint: Lumi tracks this world automatically. Open the workspace, name a branch, and build.
luma.dashboard.workspace_help: Open the active workspace for this dimension to save versions, inspect history, or recover a draft.
luma.dashboard.workspace_recovery: %s tracked block changes are waiting in the recovery draft.
luma.dashboard.other_workspaces_help: These workspaces belong to the same world but a different dimension.
luma.dashboard.workspace_empty_versions: Nothing is saved yet. Build first, then save when you want a checkpoint.
luma.dashboard.workspace_pending: %s unsaved block changes are ready to save.
luma.dashboard.workspace_ready: Everything saved. Keep building or open a branch.
luma.project.workspace_hint: This workspace quietly tracks what you changed in the current dimension.
luma.project.scope_world: Tracking mode: automatic chunk history for this dimension
luma.project.pending_changes_hint: %s unsaved changes are waiting in branch %s.
luma.project.no_versions_hint: No versions yet. Build freely, then save when you want a rollback point.
luma.project.selected_branch_inactive: This is not the active branch. Switch to it if you want new commits or restores here.
luma.project.pending_help: New world edits are recorded on the active branch: %s.
luma.project.branches_help: Open a branch to inspect its history, or switch the active branch when you want new saves and restores there.
luma.project.branch_create_from_selected: The new branch will start from the selected version: %s.
luma.project.graph_help: All branch heads and their shared ancestry are shown in one graph.
luma.project.history_search_help: Search by version id, author, or message.
luma.project.diagnostics_help: Integrity, integration status, and recovery history stay here instead of competing with the main workflow.
luma.project.integrity_clean: No integrity warnings or errors were found.
luma.project.integrations_help: Availability and capability summary for supported external tools.
luma.project.log_help: Recent recovery and restore events for this workspace.
luma.restore.initial_confirm_help: This moves the active branch head to the initial version and starts the rollback.
luma.restore.initial_confirm_warning: Warning: this may remove tracked changes in affected chunks. If fast regeneration is enabled later, it may also replace chunk contents from the world generator.
luma.history.empty: No versions have been saved yet.
luma.history.quick_save_hint: Write a short note so you can recognize this save later.
luma.history.empty_branch: This branch does not have versions matching the current filter.
luma.variant.creation_hint: Name a branch. Leave the base blank to branch from the current head%s
luma.log.legacy_notice: This project was loaded from the legacy snapshot-only format.
luma.log.empty: No recovery or restore events recorded yet.
luma.recovery.draft_present: Recovery draft: %s tracked changes on branch %s
luma.recovery.summary_help: Choose how to handle the tracked edits from the interrupted session.
luma.recovery.summary_behavior: This draft is a stored copy of unsaved world changes. It is not a separate branch or backup world.
luma.recovery.actions_help: Save the draft as a version or restore it back into the world.
luma.recovery.save_help: Save draft as version: turn the stored unsaved changes into a normal history version on the current branch.
luma.recovery.restore_help: Restore draft: apply the stored unsaved changes back into the world without creating a new version first.
luma.recovery.discard_help: This removes the stored draft without applying it back into the world.
luma.recovery.discard_extra_help: Discard draft: forget the stored unsaved changes completely.
luma.changes.no_version: Select a version to inspect changes.
luma.changes.no_parent: This version has no parent diff to inspect.
luma.changes.empty: No changed blocks were recorded for this diff.
luma.changes.more: %s more changed blocks are not shown.
luma.preview.no_version: Select a version to inspect its preview.
luma.preview.help: Top-down thumbnail for the selected version. Use it to quickly confirm you picked the right save before compare or restore.
luma.preview.unavailable: This version does not have a generated preview yet.
luma.preview.missing_file: The preview metadata exists, but the preview file is missing.
luma.preview.load_failed: The preview file could not be loaded on the client.
luma.preview.refresh_help: Refresh preview rebuilds the thumbnail from the saved version data.
luma.materials.no_version: Select a version to inspect the material delta.
luma.materials.empty: No material delta is available for the selected version.
luma.materials.more: %s more material entries are not shown.
luma.integrations.empty: No integration status entries are available.
luma.compare.left_help: Enter a version id, branch id, or `current` for the live world.
luma.compare.right_help: Enter a version id, branch id, or `current` for the live world.
luma.compare.preset_help: Use presets to avoid typing ids manually.
luma.compare.resolved_current_world: Resolved to the current live world.
luma.compare.setup_help: Set From and To on one row, then run the comparison.
luma.compare.blocks_help: Showing up to %s changed block entries.
luma.compare.variants_hint: You can also enter branch ids: %s
luma.compare.empty: Choose two references or use the presets above to start comparing.
luma.create_project.name: Project name
luma.settings.autoversions_help: Save versions automatically after a quiet period.
luma.settings.safety_snapshot_help: Store the current draft as a checkpoint before restoring an older version.
luma.settings.preview_generation_help: Create preview images when versions are saved.
luma.settings.auto_minutes_help: How often Lumi may create an automatic version.
luma.settings.idle_seconds_help: How long tracked edits may stay idle before Lumi closes the current change session.
luma.settings.snapshot_every_help: Create a full checkpoint snapshot after this many saved versions.
luma.settings.snapshot_volume_help: Create a checkpoint snapshot when the changed volume becomes large enough.
luma.settings.snapshot_mode_hint: Snapshots are automatic now: Lumi stores full sparse snapshots for touched chunks.
luma.settings.automation_help: Tune how Lumi creates versions in the background.
luma.settings.preview_help: Preview generation is optional and does not block version saving.
luma.settings.debug_help: Verbose tracing for capture, save, restore, compare, HUD, and background operations.
luma.settings.debug_logging_help: Write detailed runtime logs for this workspace. You can also force it globally with `-Dlumi.debug=true`.
luma.settings.project_state_help: These flags change how the workspace is listed in menus.
luma.settings.favorite_help: Show this workspace as a favorite where favorites are supported.
luma.settings.archive_help: Hide this workspace from the main dashboard list.
luma.settings.diagnostics_help: Read-only checks for project integrity live here.
luma.settings.save_help: All settings and project flags are saved together.
luma.settings.error_positive_int: Enter a whole number greater than zero.
luma.settings.error_positive_decimal: Enter a number greater than zero.
luma.status.singleplayer_only: This workflow is currently supported in local singleplayer only.
luma.status.project_failed: Workspace data could not be loaded.
luma.status.restore_started: Restore started. Lumi is applying blocks in the background.
luma.status.initial_restore_confirmation: Confirm restore to Initial before Lumi changes the world.
luma.status.draft_restore_started: Recovery draft restore started. Lumi is applying blocks in the background.
luma.status.recovery_version_saved: Recovery draft saved as a version.
luma.status.world_operation_busy: Another world operation is already running.
luma.status.settings_invalid: Fix the invalid fields before saving.
luma.status.create_ready: Create a project by entering bounds and a name.
luma.status.save_started: Save started. Lumi is writing version data in the background.
luma.status.amend_started: Amend started. Lumi is rewriting the branch head in the background.
luma.status.recovery_save_started: Recovery draft save started. Lumi is writing version data in the background.
